# X3 Chain Starter: Python Substrate Interface

## Upstream

- <https://github.com/polkascan/py-substrate-interface/tree/master/examples>

## Goal

Bootstrap Python operations tooling for X3 Chain (indexing, checks, automation).

## Checklist

1. Select example flows needed for ops (query, subscribe, submit).
2. Pin upstream commit/tag and record it.
3. Configure X3 Chain endpoints and key management conventions.
4. Add scripts for health checks, validator checks, and chain snapshots.
5. Add test harness for deterministic CI execution.
